title: (Douluo Dalu) Soul Land Season 2 Episode 256 Subtitle Indonesia, English
description:
Watch Online Donghua Chinese Anime Douluo Dalu Soul Land Season 2. The sequel of Soul Land Season 1 Douluo Dalu 2nd season Tang San spent his life in the Tang Outer Sect, dedicated to the creation and mastery of hidden weapons. Once he stole the secret lore of the Inner Sect to reach the pinnacle of his art, his only way out was death.

But after throwing himself off the deadly Hellâs Peak he was reborn in a different world, the world of Douluo Dalu, a world where every person has a spirit of their own, and those with powerful spirits can practice their spirit power to rise and become Spirit Masters
